pub/crontab.help CONTENTS Cron access for CS9 and instructors Crontab Cron access for CS9 and instructors ----------------------------------- We have enabled cron jobs for CS9E student accounts and for the staff accounts of several classes o

and for the staff accounts of several classes on ward.cs.berkeley.edu. (The service was formerly on torus.cs.berkeley.edu, which has been retired.) Please ask inst@eecs.berkeley.edu if you need access to this service. Crontab ------- C

need access to this service. Crontab ------- Cron on UNIX allows users to execute unattended commands at specified dates and times. The commands are read from a user's file that is edited by the command 'crontab -e'. Users are allowed to u

the command 'crontab -e'. Users are allowed to use this service if they are listed in the /etc/cron.allow (on Ubuntu Linux). The syntax for the crontab entries can be found via 'man crontab'. EECS Instructional Support Group 378/38
EECS Instructional Support Group 378/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
